_doc: DRAFT — populated from Q&A session on 2026-05-15 (resume + investments disclosed in chat). Review and sign-off before going live. The anti-AI check (apps/workers-py/src/workers/drafts/anti_ai.py) reads this file at runtime. Schema matches config/personal_facts.example.json.

identity.name: Jackson Blau
identity.self_description_long: I'm at Inveniam (Manager of DeFi and Crypto), tracking tokenized real-world assets and institutional structured finance. I focus on mechanism design and how onchain plumbing changes who has authority over canonical state. Previously VP of Education at infineo and an early ecosystem participant at Security Token Market.

as Director of Business Development at infineo (Jun 2024 – Jan 2025)
as Head of Community Management at infineo (Jul 2023 – Jun 2024)
as Community Manager & Research Analyst at Security Token Market (Jun 2021 – Apr 2023)
things_i_have_done.note: STM was later acquired by RedStone (an early version of RWA.xyz).

views_i_hold_strongly.view: Vault infrastructure is the institutional onramp. ERC-7540 vaults, curator economics, and T+0/T+14 redemption SLAs are converging on what trad-asset managers expect.
Tokenized private credit and ABS is the next leg up after treasuries. The mechanics, subordination tranches and layered facilities, translate cleanly to onchain structures.

We need onchain-native assets, not digital twins. Twins inherit off-chain settlement risk; only natively-issued assets unlock composability (rehypothecation, repo, collateral atomicity); regulators are starting to require native treatment.

things_off_limits: Specific deal sizes from Inveniam client work: $125M ABS, $73.95M Series 2024-1, $225M expandable, $200M-valuation DePIN token offering, $5B UAE acquisition, $340M implied value, $50M xGold Lending Pool, $5.76B / $305.8B SAM, $200B+ UK allocator, $600B+ alt asset manager, $40B+ RIA, $400M multifamily, $20M raise at $100M pre-money.
Inveniam Chain (NVNM) FDV scenarios, the $30M / 400M token allocation, $7.6B FDV / $750M daily volume targets, 94-CEX listing budget ($235k).

first_person_voice_examples: I keep seeing the BlackRock $7B filing read as a size story. I think it's a sovereignty story.
I think the conversation about 'tokenized RWAs' is going to bifurcate this year.
I'm watching for which issuers move first on natively-issued onchain assets, not twins.
I'd push back on one piece: the $150M move isn't retail rebalancing.
I keep coming back to one number from this filing.
I think the conventional take misses one thing.
first_person_voice_anti_examples: I just closed a position in $X.
I'm at the BlackRock office and...
I built a model that proves...
I talked to the team at...
voice_tics: lead_with_unconventional_read: 'I keep seeing X read as Y. I think it's Z.', 'The interesting part of X isn't Y. It's Z.'
